field.name: metaField
field.domain: self.metaModel.name IN ('CallTenderNeed', 'CallTenderOffer') AND (self.relationship IS NULL OR self.relationship NOT IN ('OneToMany', 'ManyToMany')) AND self.name NOT IN ('attrs', 'archived', 'importId', 'importOrigin', 'processInstanceId')

field.name: customField
field.domain: self.model IN ('com.axelor.apps.purchase.db.CallTenderNeed', 'com.axelor.apps.purchase.db.CallTenderOffer') AND self.type NOT IN ('one-to-many', 'many-to-many', 'json-one-to-many', 'json-many-to-many')
